name: Exalt to fill open slots (modify existing rare)
description: Your rare has fewer than 6 modifiers — just exalt to add more. Cheapest possible upgrade since you keep all current mods.

steps.outcome: Adds one random modifier to the rare item. Each subsequent Exalt adds another, up to 6 total. Mod tier scales with item level — higher ilvl = better rolls.

notes_for_user: Best path when the rare already has 2-4 good mods and you just want more. Stop exalting once the result is workable — every Exalt is a gamble for that slot. Advanced options: 'Omen of Sinistral Exaltation' = prefix-only, 'Omen of Dextral Exaltation' = suffix-only, 'Omen of Greater Exaltation' = adds 2 mods at once (costs 2 Exalts worth of slots), 'Omen of Homogenising Exaltation' = adds a mod of the same type as an existing mod (great for stacking resistances or attributes).
